title: break statements should be avoided except for switch cases
description: break statements should not be used except for switch casesAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?break;is an unstructured control flow statement which makes code harder to read.Ideally, every loop should have a single termination condition.Noncompliant code exampleint i = 0; while (true) { if (i == 10) { break; // Non-Compliant } Console.WriteLine(i); i++; }Compliant solutionint i = 0; while (i != 10) // Compliant { Console.WriteLine(i); i++; }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Sin
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Avoid break statements in loops - use proper loop conditions instead
